title: Admiral Yamamoto
writer: Shinobu Hashimoto, Seiji Maruyama, Katsuya Susaki
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Yûzô Kayama, Yôko Tsukasa
plot: A biography of one of the only beloved postwar figures of Japan's disastrous Pacific War. A common-sense soldier knows the war is doomed, but gamely goes ahead and does the best with what he's given.
